trickyParts: Issue #329 describes a problem already fully resolved by PR #297 (merged 2026-04-06). The RSS threshold check is implemented in config.ts, rss-monitor.ts, and index.ts health tick loop with 4 passing tests.
deviations: No code changes made — implementation already exists on main via PR #297
openQuestions: The 98.8GB production incident likely occurred on a daemon running pre-#297 code. Verify production is deployed from latest main.
Pre-existing test failure in index.test.ts ('passes controller env vars to adapter.start on startup') — unrelated to RSS
